## Source: ossf-package-analysis (2befe1c3a5a6d72c06550b27e9f9fefd9ea296b3ef1bd4d1d90581e86733e319)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'browserstack-electron-forge-include-package-plugin' @ 99.0.0 (npm) as malicious.
